wrapped.query: What are the latest Ollama release notes? Cite sources.
wrapped.response: The latest Ollama release notes are not readily available in my training data, but I can suggest checking authoritative sources such as GitHub releases (github.com/ollama/ollama/releases) or the official Release Notes document on Tony Kipkemboi's website (tonykipkemboi.github.io/ollama_pdf_rag).
